goal: Fix one bounded FileEasy v1 release blocker identified during FE-V102 or FE-V103, without expanding scope or bundling unrelated cleanup.
nonGoals: Do not expand product scope beyond the approved PRD.
Do not bundle unrelated refactors or cleanup.
Do not modify PRD or design documents unless PM explicitly opens a separate doc-change task.

acceptanceChecks.text: <replace with the exact blocked scenario that must change from fail to pass>
<replace with the exact scope-boundary or regression check that must remain true>

verificationCommands: <replace with the minimum commands needed to verify the blocker fix>
handoffQuestions: List only remaining blocker-level risks that still require PM review after this fix.
